parameters.query:
SELECT
  id,
  status_lead,
  ultima_intencao,
  evento_sistema_atual
FROM bruna_memoria_leads
WHERE phone = {{ "'" + String($('Start').first().json.resposta.phone || '').replace(/\\/g, '\\\\').replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" }}
LIMIT 1;

INSERT INTO bruna_historico_leads (
  lead_id,
  phone,
  account_id_chatwoot,
  contact_id_chatwoot,
  conversation_id_chatwoot,
  id_mensagem_origem,
  tipo_registro,
  origem_registro,
  status_lead_anterior,
  status_lead_novo,
  ultima_intencao_anterior,
  ultima_intencao_nova,
  evento_sistema,
  mensagem_texto,
  anexo_referencia,
  payload_bruto_json
) VALUES (
  {{ $json.id || 'NULL' }},
  {{ "'" + String($('Start').first().json.resposta.phone || $('Start').first().json.lead?.phone || '').replace(/\\/g, '\\\\').replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" }},
  {{ $('Start').first().json.resposta.account_id_chatwoot || $('Start').first().json.chatwoot?.account_id || 'NULL' }},
  {{ $('Start').first().json.resposta.contact_id_chatwoot || $('Start').first().json.chatwoot?.contact_id || 'NULL' }},
  {{ $('Start').first().json.resposta.conversation_id_chatwoot || $('Start').first().json.chatwoot?.conversation_id || 'NULL' }},

  {{ (() => {
    const finalId = $('Start').first().json.resposta?.id_mensagem_enviada
      || $('Start').first().json.resposta?.message_id
      || $('Start').first().json.chatwoot?.message_id
      || null;
    return finalId ? "'" + String(finalId).replace(/\\/g, '\\\\').replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL';
  })() }},

  {{ "'" + String(
    $('Start').first().json.opcoes?.eh_fup
      ? 'followup_bruna'
      : ($('Start').first().json.opcoes?.tipo_registro_historico || 'mensagem_bruna')
  ).replace(/\\/g, '\\\\').replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" }},

  {{ "'" + String(
    $('Start').first().json.opcoes?.eh_fup
      ? 'n8n_fup'
      : ($('Start').first().json.opcoes?.origem_registro_historico || 'n8n')
  ).replace(/\\/g, '\\\\').replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" }},

  {{ $json.status_lead ? "'" + String($json.status_lead).replace(/\\/g, '\\\\').replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $('Start').first().json.resposta.status_lead_novo ? "'" + String($('Start').first().json.resposta.status_lead_novo).replace(/\\/g, '\\\\').replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : ($('Start').first().json.inputs?.status_lead ? "'" + String($('Start').first().json.inputs.status_lead).replace(/\\/g, '\\\\').replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL') }},

  {{ $json.ultima_intencao ? "'" + String($json.ultima_intencao).replace(/\\/g, '\\\\').replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $('Start').first().json.resposta.ultima_intencao_nova ? "'" + String($('Start').first().json.resposta.ultima_intencao_nova).replace(/\\/g, '\\\\').replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : ($('Start').first().json.inputs?.ultima_intencao ? "'" + String($('Start').first().json.inputs.ultima_intencao).replace(/\\/g, '\\\\').replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL') }},

  {{ $('Start').first().json.resposta.evento_sistema_novo ? "'" + String($('Start').first().json.resposta.evento_sistema_novo).replace(/\\/g, '\\\\').replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : ($('Start').first().json.inputs?.evento_sistema ? "'" + String($('Start').first().json.inputs.evento_sistema).replace(/\\/g, '\\\\').replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL') }},

  {{ "'" + String(
    $('Start').first().json.resposta?.texto_resposta
    || $('Start').first().json.resposta?.message_fup
    || $('Start').first().json.message?.clean_answer
    || (
      Array.isArray($('Start').first().json.inputs?.mensagens_resposta)
        ? $('Start').first().json.inputs.mensagens_resposta.filter(Boolean).join('\n\n')
        : ''
    )
  ).replace(/\\/g, '\\\\').replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" }},

  {{ $('Start').first().json.message?.data_url ? "'" + String($('Start').first().json.message.data_url).replace(/\\/g, '\\\\').replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL' }},

  CAST({{ "'" + JSON.stringify({
    eh_fup: !!$('Start').first().json.opcoes?.eh_fup,
    tipo_followup: $('Start').first().json.resposta?.tipo_followup || null,
    resumo_followup: $('Start').first().json.resposta?.resumo_followup || null,
    contador_followup_anterior: $('Start').first().json.resposta?.contador_followup_atual ?? null,
    contador_followup_novo: $('Start').first().json.opcoes?.eh_fup
      ? Number($('Start').first().json.resposta?.contador_followup_atual || 0) + 1
      : null,
    tags_add: $('Start').first().json.resposta?.tags_add || [],
    tags_remove: $('Start').first().json.resposta?.tags_remove || [],
    texto_resposta: $('Start').first().json.resposta?.texto_resposta
      || $('Start').first().json.resposta?.message_fup
      || $('Start').first().json.message?.clean_answer
      || (
        Array.isArray($('Start').first().json.inputs?.mensagens_resposta)
          ? $('Start').first().json.inputs.mensagens_resposta.filter(Boolean).join('\n\n')
          : ''
      ),
    payload_atual_json: $('Start').first().json.resposta.payload_atual_json || {},
    resumo_lead_json: $('Start').first().json.resposta.resumo_lead_json || $('Start').first().json.inputs?.resumo_lead || {},
    opcoes: $('Start').first().json.opcoes || {}
  }).replace(/\\/g, '\\\\').replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" }} AS JSON)
);

SELECT
  id,
  status_lead,
  ultima_intencao,

WHERE phone = {{ "'" + String($('Start').first().json.resposta.phone || '').replace(/\\/g, '\\\\').replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" }}

    || $('Start').first().json.message?.clean_answer
    || (

        : ''

  ).replace(/\\/g, '\\\\').replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" }},

  {{ $('Start').first().json.message?.data_url ? "'" + String($('Start').first().json.message.data_url).replace(/\\/g, '\\\\').replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL' }},

  CAST({{ "'" + JSON.stringify({
    eh_fup: !!$('Start').first().json.opcoes?.eh_fup,
    tipo_followup: $('Start').first().json.resposta?.tipo_followup || null,
